exercises.title: The Growing Rectangle
exercises.prompt: Differentiate x²·sin(x) with the product rule — and let the grader differentiate it too.

exercises.title: The Gear Train
exercises.prompt: Differentiate (x²+1)³ with the chain rule — outer gear times inner gear, then simplify.

exercises.title: Roots Inside Roots
exercises.prompt: Differentiate √(x²+1) — a chain rule hiding under a roof.
